generationOptions.userSteeringPrompt: Create a visual road map for the project of documenting the life and heritage of Andi Andreas Daniel Uli Leitenbacher. The map should outline the path toward creating a Bavarian Wiki article, covering key milestones: his birth and royal connections (August 25th), his career as a stem cell courier and career counselor, and his family roots in Teisendorf and the Leitenbach area.
